---
title: "Collaborator Analysis"
format: html
author: Ann Holmes
---

# Lobster Analysis

## Setup

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
```

## Load data

```{r}
lobster_traps <- readr::read_csv(here::here("data", "Lobster_Trap_Counts_All_Years_20210519.csv")) %>% 
    janitor::clean_names()
```

## Clean data

### Standardize NAs 
```{r}
lobster_traps <- lobster_traps %>% 
    mutate(traps = if_else(condition = (traps == -99999), true = NA, false = traps))
```

### Remove Naples Reef


```{r}
not_napl <- lobster_traps %>% 
    filter(site != "NAPL")
```

### Subset data with lobsters at Carpinteria Reef (CARP) AND number of commercial trap floats >20


```{r}
carp_20_traps <- lobster_traps %>% 
    filter(site == "CARP" & traps > 20)
```

## Summary statistics


```{r}
max_lobster_traps <- lobster_traps %>% 
    group_by(site, month) %>%
    summarize(max_traps = max(traps, na.rm = TRUE),
              .groups = 'drop')
```
